/CAL:PHC/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNTS#5 & #6, PC 245(A)(4) & PC 29800(A)(1), A FELONY, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/ /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:#5 &#6/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 07-13-22/PPRF/TWS/X:REMAINDER OFCOUNTS TO BE DISMISSED AT TIME OF SENTENCE/ARBUCKLE/IBARRA/VD:06-28-22 HEARING/EMTERM/

/TN:KENNIETH JORDAN MATTHEWS/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY TERMS OF RELEASE/MO GRTD/EMMOD:THE DEFENDANT IS TO BE RESTRICTED WLITH A CURFEW BETWEEN THE HOURS OF 9PM TO 6AM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DOP/SAWD/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE,THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THESFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/WS/WEAP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/

/CAL:JURY TRIAL, LD 11-29-21 (COVID-19)/DAWT/X:DA READY/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL HAS AUTHORITY TO WAIVE TIME/GTW/X:LAST DAY AND TRIAL DATES VACATED/CONTD:PHC IN DEPT, 11 & TO SET JURY TRIAL IN DEPT, 22/X:DAW WITH ATTORNEY CONTACT/

/CAL: PLACEMENT OF EM AND STATUS/HD/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH  ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS ATTHAT TIME,/DEF: MAY LEAVE RESIDENCE FOR JOB INTERVIEWS AND FOR WORK UPONRECEIVING PERMISSION FROM SAN FRANSISCO SHERIFF'S DEPT,AND BY THE    DISCRETION OF THE SHERIFF'S DEPT/CTORD: REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE TODAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: FUTURE COURT DATES ARE CONFIRMED/

/CAL: DEF MOTION FOR RELEASE/X: BAIL MOTION HEARD ON THE RECORD/DEF: HASA SAN MATEO COUNTY HOLD/DEF: TO BE PLACED ON HOME DETENTION WITH CURFEW AND ELECTRONIC   MONITORING NEXT DATE/X: CURFEW WILL BE TO ATTEND WORK OR FOR JOB INTERVIEWS/ /X: HOME DETENTION AND ELECTRONIC MONITORING IS AT SHERIFF'S    DISCRETION /OR/X: IF NO APPEARANCE NEXT DATE; BENCH WARRANT TO ISSUE/DOUP: IN SAN MATEO SHERIFF'S CUSTODY/
/CAL:DEFENSE BAIL MOTION, LD 11-29-21 (COVID-19)/DAWT/X:FUTURE JURY TRIALDATE IS CONFIRMED/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 13/TRANS 13:FORTHWITH FOR DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/
/CAL: DEFENSE BAIL MOTION, LD 11-29-21 (COVID19)/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDARFOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: DEFENSE REQUEST/X: FUTURE DATE 02-03-22 CONFIRMED/

/CAL:FUR ACM ELIG RPT, LD 11-29-21/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,//DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TOCOMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO//CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSOCOMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/DTC/WS/RX/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO CHECK-IN WITH ACM VIA PHONE MONDAY THROUGH FRIDAY, 5 TIMES A WEEK/CTORD: DEFENDANT TOHOME DETENTION AT TRP RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:FUTURE JURY TRIAL DATE IS CONFIRMED/CONTD:PHC & POSSIBLE GLOBAL DISPO IN DEPT, 11/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:GARRY PRENETA/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 11-29-21/TE: 2 WEEKS/CONTD: FURTHER ACM ICR ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 10-04-21//CONTD: TRIAL ON 11-12-21/
